name: UBA : User Access from Restricted Location
notes:
Detects user access from location on "UBA : Restricted Location List"

Customer can add Country(s) from "geographic location" to the "UBA : Restricted Location List"
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations
when any of Source Geographic Country/Region are contained in any of UBA : Restricted Location List - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Access from Restricted Location on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters, BB:UBA : Excluded Geographic Locations
AND when any of Source Geographic Country/Region are contained in any of UBA : Restricted Location List - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Access from Restricted Location
